general.title: General
general.description: Name and logo of your organization.
general.name: Name
general.slugHint: The slug is permanent — it appears in URLs.
general.logoHint: PNG, JPEG, WEBP or GIF, up to 20 MB.

members.title: Members
members.removeDescription: {{label}} will lose access immediately. They can be re-invited later.

errors.owner_only: Only an owner can perform this action
errors.last_owner: You cannot remove or demote the last owner

invitations.noAccessDescription: Only admins and owners can invite people.
invitations.inviteDescription: They'll receive an email with a link to accept.

errors.already_invited: There is already a pending invitation for this email
errors.insufficient_role: You need to be admin or owner to invite
errors.not_a_member: You are not a member of this organization
errors.rate_limited: Too many invitations — slow down and try again later

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: External platforms this organization is connected to — what is installed, what is available, and its current state.

powens.name: Powens
powens.description: Bank aggregation: accounts and transactions synced automatically. The bank connection happens in the secure Powens window.

vasco.name: Parallel / VASCO
vasco.description: Investor portals of fund-admin platforms: positions, investor communications and documents pulled into the linked entities.

notion.name: Notion
notion.description: Extraction of public Notion pages linked in investor updates received by email.

docsend.name: DocSend
docsend.description: Extraction of DocSend decks linked in investor updates received by email.

groups.availableDescription: Platforms ready to be connected to this organization.

dialog.title: Connect {{name}}
dialog.description: Credentials are stored server-side and never sent back to the browser.

confirm.title: Disconnect “{{label}}”?
confirm.description: The stored credentials will be deleted. Already-imported data stays in place.

toasts.labelTaken: A connection with this name already exists.
toasts.bankRedirectError: Couldn't open the bank connection flow.

vasco.clientSlug: The first part of the investor portal's web address: ‹portal›.vasco.fund. E.g. "parallel" if you sign in at parallel.vasco.fund, "teampact" for teampact.vasco.fund.
vasco.username: The email you use to sign in to this portal.
vasco.password: The password of your access to this portal.
